top_signals.title: Treasuries Gain Before Auctions as Traders Trim Rate Hike Bets
top_signals.summary: Treasuries rose as a selloff in US stocks and further declines in oil prices curbed wagers on Federal Reserve interest-rate increases over the coming year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: More Vessels Pass Through Hormuz, Empty LNG Tankers Return
top_signals.summary: Three stranded supertankers passed through the Strait of Hormuz on Tuesday, while seven empty Qatar-linked liquefied natural gas tankers have entered in recent weeks in an early sign Gulf gas shipping may be resuming, ship-tracking data showed.Iranian…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Evacuation Plan Underway for Vessel Stranded in Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: An evacuation plan to enable hundreds of ships with some 11,000 seafarers stranded in the Gulf to sail through the Strait of Hormuz is underway after Iran and the U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
